title: UserModeNetworking reported wrong when using applehv
body:
### Issue Description

I switched from `qemu` to `applehv` by editing `/Users/<user>/.config/containers/containers.conf`:

```
...
[machine]
provider="applehv"
...
```

I created my podman machine with
`podman machine init --cpus 8 --memory 12000 --rootful --user-mode-networking --now`

But my podman machine is reported as not having UserModeNetworking.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a podman machine with applehv
2. `podman machine init --cpus 8 --memory 12000 --rootful --user-mode-networking --now`
3. `podman machine inspect`


### Describe the results you received

```
[
     {
          "ConfigPath": {
               "Path": "/Users/<user>/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.json"
          },
          "ConnectionInfo": {
               "PodmanSocket": {
                    "Path": "/Users/<user>/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman.sock"
               },
               "PodmanPipe": null
          },
          "Created": "2023-12-26T13:01:13.772628+01:00",
          "Image": {
               "IgnitionFilePath": {
                    "Path": "/Users/<user>/.config/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default.ign"
               },
               "ImageStream": "testing",
               "ImagePath": {
                    "Path": "/Users/<user>/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/applehv/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-39.20231204.2.1-applehv.aarch64.raw"
               }
          },
          "LastUp": "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z",
          "Name": "podman-machine-default",
          "Resources": {
               "CPUs": 8,
               "DiskSize": 100,
               "Memory": 12000,
               "USBs": null
          },
          "SSHConfig": {
               "IdentityPath": "/Users/<user>/.ssh/podman-machine-default",
               "Port": <userport>,
               "RemoteUsername": "core"
          },
          "State": "running",
          "UserModeNetworking": false,
          "Rootful": true
     }
]
```

### Describe the results you expected

```
[
...
          "State": "running",
          "UserModeNetworking": true,
          "Rootful": true
   ...
]
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Note that I am unsure of Network User Mode actually functions as expected or not.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I assume this is fixed on 5.0
